title: sophora tonkinensis var. tonkinensis
intro: Sophora tonkinensis var. tonkinensis, also known as Shangdi or Ku Shen, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-microbial activities. The health benefits of Sophora tonkinensis var. tonkinensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve cough and asthma symptoms, and support immune system function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of capsules, tablets, or decoctions, and are commonly used to treat respiratory and infectious diseases.
